Pythagorean system

Your Western numerology profile

Originating with Pythagoras. Letters A–Z map to digits 1–9. Calculates your four core numbers.

Life path
—
From your DOB
Expression
—
From your full name
Soul urge
—
From vowels in name
Personality
—
From consonants
Interpretation —

Chaldean system

The Babylonian signature

Considered the most mystically accurate by Cheiro. Different letter-number mapping than Pythagorean.

Psychic
—
From birth day
Destiny
—
From full DOB
Name vibration
—
From full name
Harmony
—
Name vs destiny
Interpretation —

Vedic Ankashastra

Numbers ruled by the nine planets

Rooted in the Vedas. Each number links to a planetary ruler with specific energies, colours, gems, and mantras.

—
—
Bhagyank
—
—
Name number
—
From your name

Biorhythm today

Your energy cycles right now

Four cycles run from the day you were born. Where they peak or dip shapes how today feels.

Physical · 23d
—
Emotional · 28d
—
Intellectual · 33d
—
Intuitive · 38d

Lo Shu grid

Your magic square

Your birth date plotted on the ancient Chinese grid. Gold squares show numbers you have. Dimmed squares reveal missing numbers — the lessons you came to learn.

4
9
2
3
5
7
8
1
6
Missing numbers —

Your year ahead

Personal year 2026

A 9-year cycle unique to you. Your personal year combined with the universal year shows the theme of the months ahead.
